mapper.sql: select id, user_id, book_id, del_flag, create_by, create_time from osh_user_book
mapper.select: where user_id = #{userId} and book_id = #{bookId} and del_flag = '0'

select b.id, b.title, b.cover, b.description from osh_user_book ub left join osh_book b on ub.book_id = b.id where ub.user_id = #{userId} and ub.del_flag = '0' and b.del_flag = '0' order by ub.create_time desc

select b.id, b.title, b.cover, b.description from osh_user_book ub left join osh_book b on ub.book_id = b.id where ub.user_id = #{userId} and ub.del_flag = '0' and b.del_flag = '0' order by ub.create_time desc
